channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Andy Serkis’ Animal Farm Is an Abomination: Review
item.description: 🎶 Andy Serkis' Animal Farm adaptation sparks lively debate! Are you ready to dive into this wild musical journey? 🐷🎵 #MusicNews

item.title: Office Dog Announce New Album Prime Corner: Hear “Gold Things”
item.description: 🎶 Woof woof! 🐾 Office Dog is back with a new album 'Prime Corner' and "Gold Things" is paws-itively paw-some! 🌟 #NewMusicAlert #OfficeDogPrimeCorner 🎸

item.title: The Story So Far announce fall tour with The Starting Line & Ultra Q
item.description: 🎸 Pumped for this tour lineup! @thestorysofarca, @TheStartingLine, and Ultra Q hitting the road together 🚐 Let's rock! 🤘 #MusicNews 🎶

item.title: Baauer’s Announces First Album in Six Years, Shares New Single
item.description: 🎉 Baauer is back with a bang! 🚀 Get ready to dance with his new album dropping soon! 🎶💿 #Baauer #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Bob Dylan Adds Even More ‘Rough and Rowdy Ways’ Tour Dates
item.description: Bob Dylan keeps on rockin'! 🎸✨ Check out the new tour dates for 'Rough and Rowdy Ways'! 🎶 #BobDylan #TourDates
